description: A freelance graphic designer needs to file a Schedule C for their sole proprietorship business.

nodes.task_description: Input the gross receipts from the freelance business.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly enters the total income earned.

nodes.task_description: Categorize and input business expenses such as software subscriptions and office supplies.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly enters and categorizes all business expenses.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the net profit or loss for the business.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly calculates the final net profit, which will be subject to self-employment tax.
